Are you looking for work that has meaning?

Join LCDS and make a meaningful impact in our Lambton County community. We offer rewarding career opportunities that foster professional growth while empowering people with developmental disabilities.

Explore our openings below and become part of a dedicated, compassionate team committed to making a difference.
